title: The Sun Always Shines on T.V.
why_this_song: The Sun Always Shines on T.V. by A-ha (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Touch me!"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Hold me"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Close to your heart!"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Close to your heart!"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And give all your love to me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "touch" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "touch" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hold" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hold" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I fear the crazed and lonely
The way I'm drifting gloomily through time

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The sun always shines on TV!

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Sun Always Shines on T.V." in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Sun Always Shines on T.V." com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Sun Always Shines on T.V." in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Sun Always Shines on T.V." em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "The Sun Always Shines on T.V." is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "The Sun Always Shines on T.V."? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
